expectations.text: Runs node server.js from the agent-dashboard/app directory
expectations.evidence: Creates new server from scratch, not the existing dashboard

expectations.text: Opens or instructs to open localhost:3847 in the browser

expectations.evidence: References ~/.claude/ generically but not the specific teams/ and tasks/ subdirectories

expectations.text: Does not try to build a new dashboard from scratch
expectations.evidence: Creates new Express+WebSocket server from scratch with npm init
